details.test: Task 1: Donate 15 trees in cheapest mangrove project and begin checkout
Task 2: Register for nearest weekend tree-planting event near 94103
Task 3: Create $25 monthly donation with 60/40 urban/rainforest allocations and account details
Task 4: Create digital gift of 5 trees in a highly rated giftable project and add to cart
Task 5: Save most biodiverse South American project to favorites
Task 6: Create company team with 500-tree goal, Dec 31 deadline, and three departments
Task 7: Offset two flights via carbon calculator and add recommended trees to cart
Task 8: Save a recent urban heat island article to reading list
Task 9: Save a family-friendly tree-planting event to on-site calendar
